title: ASEP Localization Bundle
description: A bundle of localized strings for a single locale. English is the canonical semantic language; localized values are generated artifacts. Canonical keys are stable and language-independent; localized values MUST NEVER be used for program logic.

sourceLocale.description: Canonical source locale the entries were derived from. MUST be 'en'.

key.description: Stable canonical key (language-independent). Program logic keys on this, never on the value.

value.description: Localized, human-facing string for this locale. Generated artifact.

sourceHash.description: Hash of the canonical (English) source string, used to detect drift and mark translations stale.
